Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 39
DMG: 17 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.

SV FIRE: +10 SV COLD: +10
WT: 6.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Post Comment
Got in the Baz
QuoteReply
# Dec 27 2004 at 2:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591788855623
274 posts
Spent all my warr's money to get this. I stuck it in offhand because I'm only two away from max piercing this level, and I wanted to build up my 1hb and 1hs. Nice little item, the 20 dex REALLY helps my skillups (+Iksar Berserker Club's proc=155 dex or so), and the 10 str helps me to NOT be so encumbered and to hit a bit harder.

Not a bad weapon. Not a bad weapon at all.

Fight the Power
QuoteReply
# Aug 07 2003 at 2:46 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759898909
Scholar
72 posts
Ok I have 37lvl warrior I bought this on a mistake in bazaar because of being a nob that I AM; and thanks too lagg and not knowing clip plane trick. About when I was in late twenty's with warrior. Ok Iam not total nob when comes to grouping in EQ I do have 65lvl wizard and cleric. This weapon is a unsung hero this thing rocks BAH LOL'S talk about being slow yes but makes up for it in DEX and STR boast bah hate lols talk about stuff they know nothing about! Team with any fast weapon and this in off hand kicks major bootty. AHHH LOL 20 dex makes up the delay time, you hit much harder and less misssing AHHH lols. Not too forget about 10str boost. Why in the hell you think they rated it as (excellent) LOLS. IN PRIME WITH SOME HAST OR HAST ITEM LOOK THE "F" OUT!!. I also have hast item Velium Swiftblade man in prime hand you see text you pierce for 75 or just reg 35 and 50 man you can't pull agro off me. Some lol *** wizzy was trying man he kept comeplaneing the the hole time HE was on. With hast item or hast cast on you this weapon is a real agro keeper. Bah lol got to screem it again 20DEX makes up delay you hit HARDER and less missing at mobs close too your on lvl and HIGHER. But a true warrior have many wepones for any Occasion some nob's don't know this yet! Warrior's are good with slow weapons if he is not man tank in group. What this you say! Ahhh yes if you have two warrior one is higher or stronger. Other warrior should act as rogue doing damage with out getting hit. Bah you say! Man my warrior group with a pally rocks, lol *** pally didn't whant too let other in because EXP was soo good. Join group with one high lvl warrior, man lols was supprise at the weapones I have and how the exp jumpt in too overdrive with two warrior and one cleric. DAH ONLY ONE PERSON should be getting HIT which is mane tank other should do damage like DOT spells. HMMM why that LOL *** Warrior still use Veluim AX. BAH in the world of roleplaying I beleave warrior's should allways duel wield. So I have no two hand weapons. True EQer Know where Iam going with that. Too many peps play this game like reg old vedio game or like some new Xbox game cry =( miss the good old days. BAH this is one 30 pluss gamer that going too try too keep EQ close to the good old DD days. FIGHT THE POWER!!

Old post i know but hey info never hurt any body right?

look at time or simmaler (sp?) weapons our 2.0 is 29 dellay (sp?) https://everquest.allakhazam.com/db/item.html?item=32776

or how bout BBoB 31 dellay Sp https://everquest.allakhazam.com/db/item.html?item=30344

and most importantly DBotW https://everquest.allakhazam.com/db/item.html?item=21814 35 dellay

in this weapon at 65 and im sure could hold its own

▲ Page top
stuff is getting cheaper
QuoteReply
# Sep 07 2002 at 11:02 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591779298392
2 posts
Got one in Zeb server bazaar for 400p the other day. Seems like the bazaar is making it so that anything that is not totally "uber" gets to be dirt cheap. Using it in offhand in combo with centi warhammer. The dex is helping me to get the neglected 1hb skill up. (Piercing and 1hs are maxxed.) I think those two weapons will make a nice combo once 1hb skill is good. In the meantime, I switch out the hammer for a centi shortsword when i get in trouble and need a better hit percentage.
▲ Page top
Love this Weap

# Aug 18 2002 at 1:59 AM Rating: Decent

Been using this in combo with my Green Jaded broadsword or my Venomous Axe of the Velium Brood. With the 20dex my axe procs like crazy and I crit a lot more often.

# Apr 30 2002 at 9:15 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252489742
8 posts
I have a lv 23 warrior without any haste, if i have this in my primary, would a centi LS be a good offhand? Or should i use this in my secondary and a Wurmslayer in my primary. Or mix n' match, What would be the best without haste and which would be the best with haste? Tell me what you think.
▲ Page top
RE: What should i use
QuoteReply
# Jun 19 2002 at 11:44 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591779947950
198 posts
OUCH as a lvl23 warrior with this gear? Hmm no. To be honest do not use a shimmerimg P and a wurmy 2gether. They both are so slow u won't hold aggro. Instead maybe do the LS & Shimmering P in offhand.
▲ Page top
Woot
QuoteReply
# Apr 12 2002 at 8:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759029167
4 posts
Bought one today for 3kpp, not a bad price at all. Have a Wurmy in main, and getting a Lammy within the week. Will use the Wurmy / Partisan combo for soloing those HG's, and will be using Centi LS / Lammy for group aggro management. Now to work up that piercing some. Will post more after I test the various combos I can produce.

Bustins Zumheads 42 Ogre Warrior
Grymlok Smash 42 Iksar Monk
Sovereign Souls (Tholluxe Paells)

16 posts

Got one of these babys for 2500p on the rathe, and teamed up with this in the primary and a frostbringer in the secondary rockin some booty. Also i wear crusty so the +dex and resists are great. You can have this in your primary and a better ratio in your offhand for mass damage or switch it around for non-stop smashing

# Sep 06 2001 at 12:34 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1593965790794
328 posts
Just FYI...if your STA is over 100, you feel no effects from having your stamina bar drop to nothing...besides not being able to jump. Your attack speed doesn't decrease at all.
